rulings.Case Title: ADOLOFO URTECHO et al VS. LUIS SEGURA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Order Awarding Attorneys Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 25, 2015, Line 1. PLAINTIFF SILVIA HURTADO, CARLOS SUMPALAJ, FLORIDALMA BAC Motion For Order Awarding Attorneys Fees And Costs is continued to December 29, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of moving papers and the operative complaint to department 501 no later than November 30, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TIM CHOI SUN et al VS. ELAINE TAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Enforce Settlement; Declaration Of Christina Y. Chen; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 25, 2015, Line 2. PLAINTIFF TIM SUN, MARY SUN Motion To Enforce Settlement; Declaration Of Christina Y. Chen; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support is continued to December 14, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 501. Plaintiffs to file a Status Update following the Probate Court's determination on the Order approving Settlement Agreement no later than Wednesday, December 9, 2015 at 12:00 p.m. Courtesy copies shall be provided to Dept. 501 the same day. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL GALINDO et al VS. SECURITY TITLE INSURANCE CO. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion And Motion To Compel Document Production From Third Party Witness Salomon Herrera; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Salomon Herrera
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 25, 2015, Line 3. PLAINTIFF PAUL GALINDO Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion And Motion To Compel Document Production From Third Party Witness Salomon Herrera; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Salomon Herrera is continued to December 8, 2015 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 301. If a Discovery Referee is appointed in this matter on December 2, 2015, then the motion will be assigned to the appointed referee accordingly. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal The Record In Case No Cud-15-652820
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 25, 2015, Line 5. DEFENDANT STEFFAN HEUER, ANDREA HEUER Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal The Record In Case No Cud-15-652820 is GRANTED. rulings.Case Title: EAGLE VISTA EQUITIES, LLC VS. MARIO SORTO ET AL (dft 170.6 challenge Judge Robertson III)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 25, 2015, Line 7. DEFENDANT MARIO SORTO, ADA SORTO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with 5 day leave to amend. =(501/REQ)
